Off Calendar Jun-29-2020 Off Calendar

Petition For Construction Of Trust; To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Distribution Of Property On Final Or Partial Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jun-29-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Construction Of Trust; To Ascertain Beneficiaries And Determine Distribution Of Property On Final Or Partial Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar Dec-02-2019 Continued To Apr-06-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Donna Quan for Petitioners.
David Parnall for Charleen Schulz (Trustee/Respondent).

Ms. Quan stated that Mr. Parnall filed his response on November 26th, that they spoke reqarding a continuance for the Parties to conduct discovery and that she is requesting
120-days. Mr. Parnall stated that he prefers 90-days, but that he would agree to 120-days. The Petition for Construction of Trust, etc. is continued to April 6, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties are to file a joint status report regarding whether or not the Parties have done mediation or are willing to participate in mediation, the disputes of fact to be presented at an evidentiary hearing, the overall time of the evidentiary hearing, the witness list and the length of time of testimony of each witness by March 23, 2020. If the Parties are interested in attending mediation between now and April 6th, they are to contact the Probate Examiner for a referral to Pro Bono Mediation.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
